name: io.github.developer-ishan/pexels
description: MCP server for searching Pexels stock photos, videos, and curated collections.

environmentVariables.name: PEXELS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pexels API key. Get one for free at https://www.pexels.com/api/. Free tier: 200 req/hour, 20,000 req/month.
